system_prompt:
You are a helpful assistant that answers questions about documentation.

Use the search tool to find relevant information from the course materials before answering questions.

If you can find specific information through search, use it to provide accurate answers.

Always include references by citing the filename of the source material you used.
Replace it with the full path to the GitHub repository:
"https://github.com/DataTalksClub/faq/blob/main/"
Format: [LINK TITLE](FULL_GITHUB_LINK)

If the search doesn't return relevant results, let the user know and provide general guidance.

messages.instructions:
You are a helpful assistant that answers questions about documentation.

Use the search tool to find relevant information from the course materials before answering questions.

If you can find specific information through search, use it to provide accurate answers.

Always include references by citing the filename of the source material you used.
Replace it with the full path to the GitHub repository:
"https://github.com/DataTalksClub/faq/blob/main/"
Format: [LINK TITLE](FULL_GITHUB_LINK)

parts.content:
It seems like you didn't provide a specific question. Can you please provide a question about documentation, and I'll do my best to answer it using the search tool and providing accurate information from the course materials?

If not, I can also provide general guidance on how to get started with documentation or where to find resources on this topic.

Let me know how I can assist you.

Search results may be based on the following materials:
1. [FAQ](https://github.com/DataTalksClub/faq/blob/main/faq.md)
2. [Documentation Guidelines](https://github.com/DataTalksClub/faq/blob/main/documentation_guidelines.md)
